# IKE Maven Plugin Support

> Shared library for IKE Maven plugins: goal identifier interface,
> base Mojo with per-goal report writing, self-healing gitignore,
> and interactive parameter resolution helpers.

## Overview

- [IKE Maven Plugin Support](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/index.html.md)

## Reports

- [Project Summary](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/summary.html.md)
- [Project Licenses](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/licenses.html.md)
- [Project Dependencies](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/dependencies.html.md)
- [Maven Coordinates](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/dependency-info.html.md)
- [Project Dependency Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/dependency-management.html.md)
- [Project Plugins](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/plugins.html.md)
- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/plugin-management.html.md)
- [Project Distribution Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/distribution-management.html.md)
- [Project Information](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/project-info.html.md)
- [Generated Reports](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin-support/project-reports.html.md)
